tools.name: ctx_duckdb_query
tools.description: Execute a SQL query against a DuckDB database

database.description: Path to the DuckDB database file

tools.name: ctx_duckdb_tables
tools.description: List all tables in a DuckDB database

database.description: Path to the DuckDB database file

tools.name: ctx_duckdb_import
tools.description: Import a CSV file into a DuckDB table
tools.command: duckdb '{{database}}' -c "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{table}} AS SELECT * FROM read_csv_auto('{{file}}')"

database.description: Path to the DuckDB database file

file.description: Path to the CSV file to import
